input.content:
---
name: Git branching convention
description: Always use feature/fix/chore branches, never commit directly to main — use MR workflow
type: feedback
---

Always create branches for commits: `feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `docs/` prefixes. Never commit directly to main. Use MR (Merge Request) workflow on GitLab.

**Why:** Standard git workflow. The user expects proper branch hygiene for a shared repo.
**How to apply:** Before any new work, create a branch from main. Commit there. Push. Create MR. This applies to all future work including M1, M2, M3.

reason: No matching rule — falling back to default
